prompts.name: Short Story
prompts.input_text: Write a short story (about 200 words) about a robot who discovers it can dream. The story should have a clear beginning, middle, and end.

prompts.name: Technical Explanation for Children
prompts.input_text: Explain how the internet works to a 7-year-old child. Use simple analogies and keep it under 150 words.

prompts.name: Persuasive Argument
prompts.input_text: Write a compelling argument for why learning a musical instrument should be mandatory in schools. Include at least three distinct supporting points with evidence or reasoning.
